name: 更换清华 apt 源（Debian 12）
description: 将 Debian 12（bookworm）的 apt 源替换为清华 TUNA 镜像源；目标 deb822 文件为 /etc/apt/sources.list.d/debian.sources。
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

SOURCES_FILE="/etc/apt/sources.list.d/debian.sources"
KEYRING="/usr/share/keyrings/debian-archive-keyring.gpg"

if [ ! -f /etc/debian_version ]; then
  echo "错误：该脚本仅适用于 Debian，当前系统不是 Debian。" >&2
  exit 1
fi

source /etc/os-release
if [ "${ID:-}" != "debian" ] || [ "${VERSION_ID:-}" != "12" ]; then
  echo "错误：该脚本目标系统为 Debian 12（bookworm）。" >&2
  echo "当前系统：${PRETTY_NAME:-unknown}" >&2
  exit 1
fi

CODENAME="${VERSION_CODENAME:-bookworm}"
if [ "$CODENAME" != "bookworm" ]; then
  echo "警告：检测到 Debian 12 的 codename 不是 bookworm（当前为 $CODENAME），仍按 bookworm 写入。" >&2
fi

if [ ! -f "$KEYRING" ]; then
  echo "警告：未找到 $KEYRING，apt update 可能失败。请先确认 debian-archive-keyring 已安装。" >&2
fi

if [ -f /etc/apt/sources.list ] && grep -Eq '^[[:space:]]*deb[[:space:]]' /etc/apt/sources.list; then
  echo "警告：/etc/apt/sources.list 仍有旧源配置；本脚本只管理 $SOURCES_FILE。" >&2
fi

mkdir -p /etc/apt/sources.list.d
#if [ -f "$SOURCES_FILE" ]; then
#  cp -a "$SOURCES_FILE" "$SOURCES_FILE.bak.$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)"
#fi

cat > "$SOURCES_FILE" <<'SOURCES'
Types: deb
URIs: https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian
Suites: bookworm bookworm-updates bookworm-backports
Components: main contrib non-free non-free-firmware
Signed-By: /usr/share/keyrings/debian-archive-keyring.gpg

Types: deb
URIs: https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/debian-security
Suites: bookworm-security
Components: main contrib non-free non-free-firmware
Signed-By: /usr/share/keyrings/debian-archive-keyring.gpg
SOURCES

apt-get update -qq

echo "APT source changed to Tsinghua mirror for Debian 12 (bookworm): $SOURCES_FILE"
